from fastapi import FastAPI, HTTPException, Request
from fastapi.responses import JSONResponse
from fastapi.middleware.cors import CORSMiddleware
from pydantic import BaseModel, Field
from datetime import datetime
from typing import List, Optional

app = FastAPI()

origins = ["*"]

app.add\_middleware(
CORSMiddleware,
allow\_origins=origins,
allow\_credentials=True,
allow\_methods=["*"],
allow\_headers=["*"],
)

class Task(BaseModel):
id: int
title: str
description: Optional[str] = None
status: str = 'pending'
created\_at: datetime = Field(default\_factory=datetime.utcnow)

tasks: List[Task] = []
task\_id = 1

def create\_task\_id():
global task\_id
return task\_id

@app.post("/tasks", status\_code=201, response\_model=Task)
async def create\_task(task: Task):
task.id = create\_task\_id()
tasks.append(task)
return task

@app.get("/tasks", response\_model=(List[Task], int, int, int))
async def get\_tasks(status: Optional[str] = None, page: int = 1, page\_size: int = 10):
filtered\_tasks = [task for task in tasks if status is None or task.status == status]
total = len(filtered\_tasks)
start = (page - 1) \* page\_size
end = start + page\_size
items = filtered\_tasks[start:end]
return items, total, page, page\_size

@app.patch("/tasks/{task\_id}/status", response\_model=Optional[Task])
async def update\_task\_status(task\_id: int, status: str):
for index, task in enumerate(tasks):
if task.id == task\_id:
tasks[index].status = status
return task
return None
